title: Make semantAH useful through RepoBrief-bound evidence and retrieval proof
goal: Convert semantAH from aspirational semantic pipeline into a measured Semantic Evidence Service through RepoBrief-bound evidence, contract repair, real ingest, and retrieval evaluation.
completion: A real semantAH RepoBrief snapshot is created or an explicit blocker is recorded.
The verified semantAH usefulness audit is stored as a Bureau artifact.

semantAH contract drift, namespace drift, stub-pipeline ambiguity, store-row contract, docs ingest, retrieval evaluation, evidence-only Observatory, and read-only consumer adapter tasks are completed or explicitly superseded.

metadata.summary: RepoBrief-bound plan to convert semantAH from aspirational semantic pipeline into measured Semantic Evidence Service.
